raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle the context","name":"What feels most important for us to talk through today?","description":"Lets Taya choose the highest-value thread before feedback gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Class impact evidence","name":"What changed for learners because of your work on the new university class?","description":"Surfaces concrete outcomes and leverage from her work in the class.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback landing","name":"How has your coaching feedback been landing with people in the room?","description":"Checks whether her feedback is being heard, understood, and used.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Repeatable moves","name":"Which part of the class work feels most repeatable now?","description":"Identifies the practices that are becoming a reliable strength rather than a one-off win.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hidden friction","name":"Where is the coaching work still taking more effort than it should?","description":"Finds the specific friction points that are easy to miss when the overall picture looks strong.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Input quality","name":"What feedback are you not getting enough of right now?","description":"Surfaces gaps in the feedback loop from learners, peers, or leadership.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback-seeking habit","name":"How are you deciding who to ask for feedback from?","description":"Looks at whether she is actively shaping the quality of feedback she receives.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would make the new university class easier to sustain week to week?","description":"Probes capacity and sustainability without assuming strain.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next stretch","name":"What part of this work do you want to get sharper at next?","description":"Opens a concrete growth conversation about the next area to develop.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Close the loop","name":"Given what we talked through, what is the first concrete thing you want to change before we meet again?","description":"Ends on a specific commitment with a near-term action.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
